heading: Allocation of funds for administration and reimbursement of States
label: 2907 Allocation of funds for administration and reimbursement of States
notes: Termination of Trust Territory of the Pacific IslandsFor termination of Trust Territory of the Pacific Islands, see note set out preceding , Territories and Insular Possessions.section 1681 of Title 48

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The total amount appropriated pursuant to for any fiscal year shall be available for administration and for allocation among the States as provided in this section.section 2910 of this title

the Secretary shall deduct so much, but not to exceed 8 percent thereof, as may be necessary for administering during such fiscal year the provisions of this chapter relating to the purposes for which so appropriated;

children.label: A
children.text: for the District of Columbia and the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico each a sum equal to not more than one-half of 1 percent of such amount; and

children.label: B
children.text: for Guam, American Samoa, the Virgin Islands, the Trust Territory of the Pacific Islands, and the Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands each a sum equal to not more than one-sixth of 1 percent of such amount; and

children.label: A
children.text: one-third of which is based on the ratio to which the area of such State bears to the total area of all such States, and

children.label: B
children.text: two-thirds of which is based on the ratio to which the population of such State bears to the total population of all such States,

children.heading: Treatment of amounts allocated but not used for any fiscal year
children.label: c Treatment of amounts allocated but not used for any fiscal year

children.text: That portion of any amount deducted by the Secretary under subsection (b)(1) for administrative purposes for any fiscal year and not expended during such fiscal year shall remain available for administrative purposes until the close of the next succeeding fiscal year and if not obligated or expended by the close of such succeeding fiscal year shall be available for disbursement by the Secretary without regard to subsection (b), to the States to carry out the purposes of this chapter.

That portion of any amount allocated to any State under subsection (b)(2) or (3) for any fiscal year and not disbursed to the State for such fiscal years under shall remain available for disbursement to the State under such section for the next succeeding fiscal year and if not disbursed for such succeeding fiscal year shall be available for disbursement by the Secretary, without regard to subsection (b), to the States to carry out the purposes of this chapter.section 2905 of this title
